_comment: pd-MIG-PORT-ASGS-CANONICAL — the 5 PyxCloud platform-service ASGs (SSO/VPN/obs/SAST/backend) expressed in the CANONICAL vocabulary as virtual-machine-scale-groups of 1 (self-heal). The same abstract topology descends to a DOKS node-pool on DigitalOcean (auto_scale, min_nodes=1) and an aws_autoscaling_group on AWS. This file is the canonical mapping; the authoritative, executable version is catalog.PlatformServices() / PlatformScaleGroupComponents() with the plan-only round-trip in platform_asgs_test.go.
name: platform

services.name: sso
services.note: Keycloak SSO — self-heal closes the random-502 outage class
